app_context: A demo SaaS landing page and checkout flow for indie builders.

persona.label: Launch-week indie founder
persona.context: Wants quick confidence that the product is real before joining a waitlist.
goals: Understand the product in under a minute
biases: Skims pages quickly and dislikes vague AI claims

task_outcomes.notes: The broad promise was appealing but the exact output was not obvious until scrolling.
The CTA appeared to freeze for a few seconds after clicking.

issues.title: Signup CTA gives no progress feedback
issues.confidence_rationale: Observed once during the primary signup task.
steps_to_reproduce: Wait for a visible state change
issues.expected: The CTA should show loading or move to the next step promptly.
evidence: Observed no loading text or spinner after click
issues.tester_reaction: I would probably click again because it feels like the button missed my click.

overall_sentiment: The idea is useful, but the signup moment feels fragile right when I am deciding whether to trust it.
top_recommendations: Add immediate progress feedback to the primary CTA.
Show a concrete report preview above the fold.
assumptions: The demo app is safe test data.
safety_notes: No payment or production action was attempted.
